Book Demo

  • Completely anonymous. No stigma. No limits.

    From first steps to ongoing care, Wysa offers safe, clinically backed support for individuals, teams, and health systems.

    Whether it is self-help, guided referral, or between-session care, Wysa makes it easier to take the next step.

    Learn more

  • Completely anonymous. No stigma. No limits.

    From first steps to ongoing care, Wysa offers safe, clinically backed support for individuals, teams, and health systems.

    Whether it is self-help, guided referral, or between-session care, Wysa makes it easier to take the next step.

    Learn more

  • We re-think how behavioral health works.

    Care that fits every setting

    People everywhere are turning to AI. Wysa is the safe, evidence-based alternative. It is always available and designed to integrate with your care model.

    Support across the continuum

    From the very first step to ongoing follow-up, Wysa overcomes stigma to help people get started, stay connected, and follow through with care.

    Outcomes that matter

    Wysa improves engagement, reduces drop-offs, builds trust, and helps organizations lower costs while scaling support.

  • Collaborative care through primary care

    Looking for support with the Collaborative Care Model (CoCM)?

    Wysa has joined forces with April Health to help primary care practices deliver integrated behavioral health care through CoCM. April Health combines people-powered care coordination with smart technology to make it easy for practices to get started, scale quickly, and improve outcomes.

    Every referral receives AI support regardless of insurance status.

    Whether you're already billing CoCM or just beginning to explore it, April Health is here to help.

    Visit April Health to learn more

  • Whole-person care through physical therapy

    Support that bridges physical and mental health.

    Kins is now part of Wysa, expanding access to integrated support for mind and body. Licensed clinicians deliver physical therapy outside the clinic, while Wysa’s AI bridges physical health and mental wellbeing, no matter the care pathway.

    Whether you’re expanding virtual PT services or just beginning to integrate mental health support, Wysa and Kins are ready to help move care forward.

    Visit Kins to learn more

  • Why Wysa?

  • Always on, always there

    No matter the time of day, Wysa is ready to help: no appointments, no waiting, just instant access to care.

    Human in the loop

    All of Wysa’s care pathways include human oversight, ensuring safe, guided support at every step.

    Trusted by millions worldwide

    With over 6 million users and counting, Wysa has become a globally trusted leader in wellbeing support.

    Anonymous and secure

    Stigma-free and anonymous, Wysa is designed to feel safe, supportive, and judgment-free.

    Backed by research

    Backed by peer-reviewed research showing improvements in mood and wellbeing outcomes.

    Built for scale

    From employers to health systems, Wysa is designed to support enterprise-level deployments and care teams.

    Safer by design

    Wysa’s AI never makes decisions on its own. It provides explainable, defensible support that fits into real clinical workflows.

    Get started

  • Trusted by providers, employers, and payors worldwide

  • Trusted by leading organizations around the world

  • Latest news

    Wellcome Trust awards £5.3 miillion grant to Wysa

    Funding for digital mental health intervention for adolescent girls in India

    Wellcome has awarded £5.3 million to Wysa to fund a scale-up study that will adapt a clinically validated digital mental health intervention for adolescent girls living in rural India, a population facing some of the most significant mental health inequalities globally.

    Wysa cited in Singapore Parliament for mental health support

    Named in parliamentary debate on digital mental health support for young people

    Senior Minister of State for Health Dr Poh-Koon Koh cited Wysa in Singapore's Parliament while addressing questions on mental health support for teenagers and young adults. Wysa powers mindline.sg, one of Singapore's first digital mental health platforms, providing 24/7 CBT-based support to supplement professional services.

    AI-powered support nearly triples coaching session completion

    Peer-reviewed study published in JMIR finds significant uplift in engagement

    A peer-reviewed study of 1,213 Wysa users found that access to AI-powered support between coaching sessions makes users nearly three times more likely to complete their coaching programme. Users with app access averaged 6.57 sessions, compared to 0.55 for those using coaching alone.

    Wysa launches Dreamkit to expand mental health access in rural India

    A phygital approach to building emotional resilience in low-resource settings

    Wysa has launched Dreamkit in Maharashtra, combining physical workbooks and clinically backed digital tools to bring mental health support to adolescent girls in rural communities where access to care is limited. Co-designed with local partners and delivered in Marathi, the programme bridges the gap between technology and the people who need it most.

    Wysa named Top 10 winner at India AI Impact Summit 2026

    Recognised among 1,350+ global applications in the AI for All category

    Wysa has been selected as a Top 10 winner of the AI for All: Global Impact Challenge at the India AI Impact Summit 2026, chosen from over 1,350 applications across 60 countries. The recognition highlights Wysa's mission to close the gap between mental health need and access, particularly in underserved communities across India.

    Wysa featured in Advanced Practitioner Mental Health textbook

    Case study for best practice in emerging digital mental health technology

    Wysa has been selected as a case study in "The Advanced Practitioner in Mental Health," a new mandatory textbook for Advanced Practitioner Masters and PhD programs across the UK. The chapter, written by Wysa's Emma Taylor, puts Wysa on the curriculum for the next generation of mental health leaders.

  • Let’s make wellbeing support accessible to all

    Wysa is more than an app. It is a safety-assured, globally trusted partner that helps providers, payors and organizations scale support and improve outcomes.

    From self-help to referral to care team support, Wysa makes emotional wellbeing support easier to access, safer to deliver, and more engaging to use.

    Ready to see more?

    Schedule a discovery call

  • Disclaimer: Wysa is not designed to assist with crises such as abuse, severe mental health conditions that may cause feelings of suicide, harm to self, and any other medical emergencies. Wysa cannot and will not offer medical or clinical advice. It can only suggest that users seek advanced and professional medical help. Please reach out to your country-specific suicide hotline in case of an emergency.

    You must be at least 18 years of age to use Wysa. If you are between 13 and 18 years of age, please read through the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy along with your parents or legal guardian to understand eligibility before use. Wysa is not designed to be used by children under 13.
